Video.summary: Monster Jam blasts into the Silverdome with freestyle! It's the most extreme monster jam action you'll see anywhere!
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Arena in 30 returns to the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ for round 5.
Video.title: Prudential Center - Newark, NJ

Video.summary: Monster Jam's biggest of the best compete at Metlife Stadium on East Rutherford, NJ.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: It's Primetime in Tampa as Stadium Championship East continues for Round 9.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Check out this epic compilation of Grave Digger's best moments - featuring drivers Tyler Menninga, Krysten Anderson, and more over the years!
Video.title: Best of Grave Digger

Video.summary: Check out Monster Jam's March 30, 2019 Stadium Championship Series 3 event at the Mercedes-Benz Superdome in New Orleans, Louisiana. Featuring Charlie Pauken and Grave Digger, Cory Rummell and Megalodon Fire, Mike Vaters and Black Stallion, Jamey Garner and Over Bored, Todd LeDuc and Monster Energy, Jim Koehler and Monster Mutt, and so many more!
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: Rev the engine and drop the hammer - it's time for Monster Jam! The drivers head to RCA Dome in Indianapolis for racing fun!
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2020 season revs onward at Raymond James Stadium on January 11, 2020!
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Grave Digger has taken the series title! How will the finale turn out? Tune in to find out!
Video.title: Carrier Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Watch as the greatest Monster Jam superstars race into action at the Alamodome in San Antonio, TX, on January 12, 2008.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Racing

Video.summary: For the first time ever, Monster Jam takes a trip across the pond to Sweden for some awesome racing and freestyle action from Gothenburg, Sweden, on June 9, 2007.
Video.title: Ullevi - Gothenburg, Sweden

Video.summary: In a continuation of events, don't miss the freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium on February 2, 2013.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes around the world in this exciting special!
Video.title: International Show

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 3 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Petco Park, in San Diego, CA.
Video.title: Petco Park - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from Angel Stadium on January 25, 2020.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Things are heating up as Monster Jam's 2001 season heads to the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA! It's time for racing action from your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Pontiac Silverdome hosts Monster Jam one last time before it gets destroyed with bombastic racing action on January 7, 2006.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Racing

Video.summary: The gauntlet has been thrown- a past champion goes up against the current champ in a battle for the top in Minneapolis, MN at the Metrodome.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Strap in for epic racing and freestyle action from the Citrus Bowl on January 31, 2014.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: The fun doesn't stop as Monster Jam continues in New Orleans- this time with freestyle action that just won't quit!
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Jacksonville Municipal Stadium is sold out with epic freestyle action from Jacksonville, FL on February 24, 2007.
Video.title: Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle
Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle
Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the LIVE racing action from AT&T Stadium on February 28, 2014.
Video.title: Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into Edward Jones Dome on February 5, 2015.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into M&T Bank Stadium, on June 2, 2012 with all your favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Image.alt: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta, Georgia.
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Stadium - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Part one of the Freestyle action from World Finals XVI on March 19, 2015.
Video.title: World Finals XVI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1

Image.alt: World Finals XVI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1
World Finals XVI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1
World Finals XVI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1

Video.summary: The high-octane energy of the Arena Championship Series East hits the Steel City as Monster Jam takes over PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. This episode features elite drivers pushing their 12,000-pound machines to the limit in JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and a spectacular Freestyle finale. Watch as the intensity peaks with a high-stakes family showdown between Jon Zimmer and his son, Jon Zimmer Jr., and follow the inspiring journey of MJ Solorio as he transforms from a "super fan to superstar" behind the wheel of El Toro Loco. From the legendary rivalry of Grave Digger to Coty Saucier's masterful performance in Dragon, witness a night of shattered limits and epic dirt-shredding action.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: Don't miss the best moments of racing and freestyle World Finals XIII!
Video.title: Best of World Finals XIII

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central takes moves into the Ford Center in downtown Evansville, Indiana for the series finale featuring the return of Monster Jam legend, Jon Zimmer Sr. in Wild Side. Grave Digger’s Brandon Vinson looks to end the season with another championship before competing at World Finals XXII in Nashville.
Video.title: Ford Center - Evansville, IN

Video.summary: The Monster Jam All-Star Challenge wraps up its two-day spectacle.
Video.title: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Image.alt: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
